vibe: Industrial, utilitarian, highly legible under poor lighting, 'command-center' efficiency

typography.mono_font: JetBrains Mono, monospace (MANDATORY for weight numbers)
typography.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-bold text-[#52525B]

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white font-bold uppercase tracking-widest rounded-none p-6 active:opacity-80 justify-center items-center flex
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F4F4F5] border-2 border-[#09090B] text-[#09090B] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest rounded-none p-6 justify-center items-center flex
buttons.delete: bg-black text-white p-4 rounded-none font-bold active:opacity-80

cards.metric_card: bg-white border-2 border-[#09090B] p-6 rounded-none flex-1
cards.metric_card_highlight: bg-[#09090B] border-2 border-[#09090B] p-6 rounded-none flex-1 text-white

scanner_view.container: relative aspect-square w-full border-4 border-[#09090B] bg-black overflow-hidden

sections: Header: App title ('WEIGHT SCANNER') and clear session button
Scanner: Camera view with bright targeting box
Live Totals: Grid containing Total Netto, Total Brutto, and Item Count metrics in monospaced fonts
Action: Large manual entry button or View History button at bottom
List: Scrollable FlatList of items. Each row must display Netto/Brutto boldly.
Swipe/Button: Explicit delete action on each row (no hidden swipes, make it visible for gloved hands).

accessibility_and_ux.touch_targets: Minimum 48px height, preferred 64px for primary actions to accommodate warehouse workers using gloves.
accessibility_and_ux.contrast: Black on White or Black on Safety Orange. High contrast ratios mandatory (Neo-brutalist approach).
accessibility_and_ux.feedback: Visual active states (opacity change) and Haptic feedback on successful scan and deletion.
accessibility_and_ux.empty_states: Stark, text-driven. E.g., 'NO ITEMS SCANNED. AWAITING QR CODE.' in monospace.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a React Native / Expo application. Apply these design rules using NativeWind (Tailwind for React Native) or standard StyleSheet objects.
The UI must feel industrial and 'Brutalist' (Archetype 4). Do not use soft rounded corners (use rounded-none). Elements should have strong solid borders.
Use a monospace font for all weight values and item counts so digits align perfectly vertically. Ensure unit 'g' is visibly smaller than the numbers.
Do not use generic 'card' layouts with soft shadows. Use harsh 2px borders.
Ensure all interactive elements have a `testID` attribute (e.g., testID='scan-history-button').
Ensure the layout is highly visible under poor warehouse lighting.
